title: Bren [Bin's Guns Workshop]
description: Smash the zombie invasion with a machine gun! Crush the skeletons' bones with an assault rifle! Send your enemies to a fiery grave with a shotgun and dragon's breath rounds!
body:
_Smash the zombie invasion with a machine gun! Crush the skeletons' bones with an assault rifle! Send your enemies to a fiery grave with a shotgun and dragon's breath rounds!_

This mod is a fork for [_Bren_](https://modrinth.com/mod/bren) and I make some weird but maybe interesting changes.
<details>
<summary>Changes</summary>

  
- Damage become higher and recoil become lower
- Change the ammo of magazine from 20 to 30,
- The cost of ammunition become lower
</details>

Tips:1.21.2+'s fabric version has some bug,so some of the original module's functions cannot be restored for the time being：
1. The color of clothed magazine


Some new gun will be add in the future

Some guns without crafting recipes need to be obtained by searching supply crates on the surface.


Thanks for [RagingZombies](https://www.curseforge.com/members/ragingzombies/projects) with his 3D resource pack:[FNP-Zo-Metric](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/fnp-zo-metric),it inspired me to make same things.

Also Thanks for [ribss498](https://modrinth.com/user/ribss498) with his 3D guns mod:[Scorched Guns 2](https://modrinth.com/mod/scorched-guns-2),it inspired me to make a more mechanical texturepacks.
